title: Add /api/evidence-case/drift and /api/evidence-case/stress-test endpoints
prompt:
Edit packages/ux-lab/server/index.ts to add 2 new POST endpoints BEFORE the wildcard proxy.

1. POST /api/evidence-case/drift
   Input: { control_ids?: string[] }
   Calls: child_process.exec('unset VIRTUAL_ENV && cd .pi/skills/create-evidence-case && .venv/bin/python tools/compute_threat_delta.py' + (control_ids ? ' --control-ids ' + control_ids.join(',') : ' --all-recent'))
   Capture stdout, parse last JSON object (stdout has log lines mixed in — find last line starting with '{' or use rfind trick).
   Timeout: 120000ms
   Return: parsed JSON or { error: string } with 502

2. POST /api/evidence-case/stress-test
   Input: { question_bank?: string }
   Calls: child_process.execFile('.pi/skills/create-evidence-case/run.sh', ['stress-test', '--question-bank', question_bank || 'batch_50_f36', '--json'])
   Timeout: 300000ms
   Return: parsed JSON stdout or { error: string } with 502

Both use const { execFile, exec } = require('child_process') and promisify.
Place endpoints BEFORE the app.all('/api/memory/*') wildcard proxy line.
